title: alchemilla vulgaris var. lineata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. lineata, also known as the Lady's Mantle, is a flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and menstrual problems. The health benefits of Lady's Mantle include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce menstrual cramps, and soothe digestive issues such as diarrhea and ulcers. Lady's Mantle can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in natural remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
